_comment_purpose: Settings for Claude Code in the Nitrox project. This file is committed to the repo and applies to all contributors. Personal preferences go in CLAUDE.local.md (gitignored), not here.
_comment_excludes: Don't load CLAUDE.md files from build artifacts or vendored code.
_comment_commands: Project-specific custom commands available via /command-name in Claude Code sessions. Add custom commands as files in .claude/commands/ if needed.
_comment_hooks: Reserved for future use. Hooks like InstructionsLoaded can be useful for debugging which CLAUDE.md files are being loaded; uncomment when needed.
_comment_subagents: Subagent configurations go in .claude/subagents/ if used. Not currently configured.
